commands: uv run ruff check (3 changed py files)

size.note: Net deletion dominated by wholesale removal of the 280-line workflow body (SUBSTITUTE-Replace); mechanically simple

safety.note: 1 infra file (.github/workflows/release-on-merge.yml) — the load-bearing change; loop-guard survival verified

completeness.note: Change is itself test+infra; 8 new tests + 4 re-pointed sibling tests

architecture.note: Loop-guard survives shim->reusable workflow_call indirection (verified); local-ref-vs-tag decision correct; no domain/infra boundary issues (CI workflow)

security.note: secrets: inherit forwards GITHUB_TOKEN to same-repo local-path reusable workflow (no cross-repo leak); no hardcoded credentials; local-path uses: pins to current commit (no third-party supply-chain risk)

quality.note: low: _LOCAL_USES constant duplicated across 2 test modules; consciously not extracted (Blue rationale: pytest module independence > one-literal DRY)
